changes: Sacred Prism: Damage reduction has been changed from 40% to 30%.
Between the Eyes: Potency when target is bound, stunned, or asleep has been reduced from 3 times normal damage to 2.5 times normal damage.
Damage bonuses for dark knight have been increased in PvP encounters.
Damage bonuses for ninja have been increased in PvP encounters.
Steel Peak: Stun duration has been reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.

new_content.name: Alexander: The Creator (Savage)
new_content.description: Adjustments include removal of weekly restrictions, direct access to areas, Duty Finder support, and the addition of the Echo.

new_content.name: The Feast
new_content.description: Season Four begins. Features new rewards and adjustments to PvP actions and the adrenaline gauge.

new_content.name: The Fold
new_content.description: PvP arena receiving new quick chat options.

new_content.name: Party Finder
new_content.description: Gamepad/controller control adjustments for improved navigation.

new_content.name: Free Trial
new_content.description: 14-day limit removed; character data can now be transferred to the full version.
